subcodes.first_line: A remembrance from Our presence unto him who desireth to drink of the sealed wine from the hand of the bounty of his Lord, the All-Bountiful - he is of them that believe [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر من لدنا لمن اراد ان یشرب رحیقی المختوم من ید عطاء ربه الکریم انه ممن آمن
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day
